paper_title: EMD combined with ensemble of machine learning predictors for foreign exchange rate forecasting

entities.description: The main research field focusing on predicting currency exchange rates using financial data.
The process of breaking down a time series into simpler components like IMFs and residues.
A property of financial data where statistical properties change over time, making forecasting difficult.
A novel hybrid forecasting approach combining Empirical Mode Decomposition with an ensemble of machine learning predictors.
A forecasting model combining empirical mode decomposition with an ensemble of Long Short-Term Memory models.
A forecasting model combining empirical mode decomposition with an ensemble of k-nearest neighbors predictors.
A technique to decompose original time series into intrinsic mode functions (IMFs).
A type of deep learning neural network suitable for extraction and learning of abstract features.
A nonparametric shallow machine learning algorithm used for regressor forecasting.
A Python library used for implementing the EMD decomposition method.
A deep learning library used to implement LSTM models.
Hardware equipment used for conducting the experiments.
Daily foreign exchange rates between Euro and China Yuan.
Daily foreign exchange rates between Euro and US dollar.
Daily foreign exchange rates between British Pound and US dollar.
Daily foreign exchange rates between US dollar and Japanese Yen.
Daily foreign exchange rates between US dollar and Turkey Lira.
Daily foreign exchange rates between US dollar and Swiss franc.
Proportion of the dataset used for model training.
Proportion of the dataset used for model validation.
Proportion of the dataset used for model testing.
Memory capacity of the computer used for experiments.
Researcher affiliated with HUFLIT and Ho Chi Minh City University of Technology.
Researcher affiliated with Ho Chi Minh City University of Technology.
